final:
module top_module(
    input  A   ,
    input  B   ,
    input  C   ,
    output X   ,
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB
);assign X = A | B | C;
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (A & B & C) begin
        X <= 1'b0;
      end else if (A & B) begin
        X <= 1'b0;
      end else if (A & C) begin
        X <= 1'b0;
      end else if (B & C) begin
        X <= 1'b0;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
